/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/argus_syncStereoRawReprocess.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/argus_syncStereoRawReprocess.dir/stereoYuvConsumer.cpp.o -o argus_syncStereoRawReprocess  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/tegra: /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/tegra/libnvargus_socketclient.so ../utils/libargussampleutils.a /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt -Wl,-Bdynamic /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt -Wl,-Bdynamic -lpthread -lSM -lICE -lX11 -lXext -lEGL -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -latk-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libGLESv2.so.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/tegra/libnvbufsurface.so
